summary: KD.WebAI NOC v13.x Internet Computer app with React dashboard and Motoko canisters; current focus is integrating a Universal Launch Report page/tab that fetches live canister metrics via the ICP JavaScript agent.
architectural_notes: Add React component `UniversalLaunchReport.tsx` and register it in the router (e.g., route `/report`) plus navigation link in dashboard UI.
Frontend should use ICP JavaScript agent actors to query canister methods (backend/dao/treasury/ai) and refresh metrics on an interval (e.g., every 10s).
Backend canister(s) may need new query methods to support the report (e.g., `getOmniMeshStatus(): {status: Text; latency: Nat}` and `getCyclesBalance(): Nat`, plus treasury/DAO status methods).
Centralize actor exports in a `canister.{js,ts}` module with canister IDs sourced from environment variables (e.g., `CANISTER_ID_KD_BACKEND`, `CANISTER_ID_KD_DAO`, `CANISTER_ID_KD_TREASURY`).

existing_features.title: Create a new authenticated Universal Launch Report page/component in the KD Platform area that renders a “KD.WebAI NOC v13.1 - Universal Launch Report” view similar to the user-provided React example, using the existing KD/NOC Tailwind styling tokens (e.g., bg-kd-bg, bg-kd-panel, text-kd-text) and English-only user-facing text.

Add a new route for the Universal Launch Report under the existing TanStack Router configuration (frontend/src/App.tsx) and add an in-app navigation entry from the KD Platform dashboard so users can open the report as a new tab/page in the dashboard flow.

Fetch and display live data on the Universal Launch Report page using the existing React Query hooks/actor flow (frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts + useActor), including: treasury status/TVL (from getTreasuryStatus), Omni-Mesh status (from getOmniMeshStatus), cycles balance (new query), and DAO proposals (from getDaoProposals). Configure polling/refresh every 10 seconds for these report metrics.

Expose a backend query method to return the canister cycles balance, and wire it into the frontend report. Add a new public query function on the existing single Motoko actor (backend/main.mo) that returns cycles balance, gated with the same RBAC pattern used by other NOC query methods.

Update the frontend’s canister/type bindings so the new backend method (getCyclesBalance) is available to TypeScript imports already used in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts (i.e., ensure the generated/declared backend interface includes the new method and build succeeds).

new_feature_requests.summary: Integrate Universal Launch Report as a new React dashboard tab/route and fetch live metrics from deployed canisters using the ICP JavaScript agent (treasury status/TVL, OmniMesh status+latency, cycles balance, DAO proposals).
